title: Cross Validation, Clearly Explained
summary: Josh Starmer explains k-fold cross-validation with visual examples, including why we rotate the test fold and how to estimate generalization error.

title: Bias and Variance, Clearly Explained
summary: StatQuest explanation of the bias-variance tradeoff using visual decomposition of prediction error.

title: Random Forests, Clearly Explained
summary: StatQuest explanation of random forests — how bagging and random feature selection reduce variance compared to single decision trees.

title: Gradient Boost, Clearly Explained
summary: StatQuest visual explanation of gradient boosting — sequential error correction and how residuals drive each new tree.

title: Logistic Regression, Clearly Explained
summary: StatQuest explains logistic regression from log-odds to probability, including how the sigmoid function works and coefficient interpretation.

title: Decision Trees, Clearly Explained (CART)
summary: StatQuest walkthrough of CART decision trees — Gini impurity, information gain, and how splits are chosen.

title: ROC and AUC, Clearly Explained
summary: StatQuest visual explanation of ROC curves and AUC for evaluating binary classifiers across different probability thresholds.

title: k-Nearest Neighbors, Clearly Explained
summary: StatQuest explains kNN for classification and regression — how distance determines predictions and how k controls the bias-variance tradeoff.

title: Neural Networks (3Blue1Brown Series)
summary: Grant Sanderson's visual series on neural networks — how neurons connect, what gradient descent does geometrically, and what backpropagation computes.

title: Khan Academy Statistics and Probability
summary: Comprehensive statistics course covering probability, hypothesis testing, regression, and confidence intervals — useful foundation for all MBAN courses.

title: Khan Academy Linear Algebra
summary: Linear algebra concepts — vectors, matrices, eigenvalues — that underpin PCA, SVMs, neural networks, and most ML algorithms.

title: Introduction to Linear Programming
summary: MIT OCW optimization course covering LP formulation, simplex method, duality, and integer programming.

title: LangChain Documentation
summary: Official LangChain documentation covering agents, tools, chains, memory, and LangGraph integration.

title: SQL Fundamentals
summary: SQL query writing fundamentals: SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, JOINs, subqueries, and window functions.

title: scikit-learn User Guide
summary: Official scikit-learn documentation for kNN, random forest, gradient boosting, SVM, and model selection/cross-validation.
